name: drawio
description: Local draw.io MCP integration for generating and opening diagrams from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Create and open draw.io diagrams from Codex
interface.longDescription: Adds draw.io MCP tools so Codex can open XML, CSV, and Mermaid diagrams directly in draw.io.
defaultPrompt: Create a Mermaid sequence diagram for login.
Build an org chart from CSV in draw.io.
Open draw.io XML for an architecture diagram.
